title: Kamala Harris campaign expected to announce VP running mate Tuesday morning
summary:
Vice President Kamala Harris' campaign plans to announce her running mate Tuesday morning. The selection process involved multiple contenders, including Pennsylvania Governor Josh Shapiro, Minnesota Governor Tim Walz, and Arizona Senator Mark Kelly. Harris has been seeking a governing partner with the ability to step into the presidency and share her values of fighting for the middle class and protecting democracy.

Harris' announcement will be followed by a campaign video and a rally in Philadelphia on Tuesday. Her running mate selection is based on qualities President Biden valued when he chose her, such as experience and qualification for the presidency. The announcement comes after Biden ended his reelection campaign, leading the Democratic Party to rally behind Harris.

Harris previously met with the top contenders in person and virtually. The announcement will mark a significant step in the Democratic Party's preparations for the November election. Once the running mate is announced, the Democratic ticket will be set for the upcoming presidential race.
